message:
fix(imports): Fail fast on missing builtin modules instead of silently continuing

Changed builtin module import handling to fail immediately instead of:
- Printing ERROR but continuing execution
- Marking module as skipped and letting codegen proceed
- Causing silent runtime failures when builtin functions are called

Changes:
- imports.zig:506: Changed 'continue' to 'return error.MissingBuiltinModule'
- core.zig:89: Added MissingBuiltinModule to CodegenError enum
- imports.zig:469: Added debug output for stub modules (test-only placeholders)

Impact:
- CI will now catch missing builtin modules immediately
- Build fails with clear error message explaining how to fix
- No more silent skips that cause confusing downstream failures

This is CRITICAL for CI reliability - 'fail fast fail loud' principle.
